title: Airport Service Charge (Appointment of Collection Agent) Notice, 2002
title_en: Airport Service Charge (Appointment of Collection Agent) Notice, 2002

provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the Airport Service Charge (Appoint­ment of Collection Agent) Notice, 2002 and shall be deemed to have come into operation on the 1 st day of July 2001.

It is hereby, notified that the Kilimanjaro Airport Development Com­pany Limited is appointed as a collection agent of the Tanzania Revenue Authority at the Kilimanjaro International Airport, for the purpose of collecting airport service charge.
